reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 이것때문에 저희 3남매 난리났어욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en: Our three pups went absolutely crazy over this 😂😂😂😂😂

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 환장해요 .. 바잇미 농산물 시리즈는 애가 다 환장해요 … 자꾸 어디선가 적양파를 물어와선 .. 눈을 희번득 까며 광기를 보여줍니다 … 진짜 바잇미 장난감 너무 귀여워서 인간마저 반하게 해 …
reviews.content_en: I'm obsessed.. the BITE ME vegetable series has my pup obsessed too… he keeps bringing red onions from somewhere and shows me his crazy eyes 😂… the BITE ME toys are seriously so cute, even humans fall for them…

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 장난감 안 좋아하는 첫째도 잘 가지고 놀고,, 장난감 좋아하는 셋째가 유독 좋아해서… 맨날 삶은옥수수상태로 젖어있습니다,,, 이번에 세개 재구매한거구요,,, 옥수수 죽으면 또 구매할 예정입니다!! 옥수수 머리 부분 쥐뜯는(?)게 재밌나봐요.. 바스락거리는 소리도 덤으로 좋아하는 것 같고.. 옥수수 추천합니다,,
reviews.content_en: Even my first one who doesn't usually like toys plays with it well, and my third one who loves toys is especially into it… it's constantly soaked like boiled corn 😅 I'm reordering three more this time… and I'm planning to buy more corn toys when this one dies!! My pup seems to have fun gnawing(?) on the corn head part.. and also seems to like the rustling sound as a bonus.. I recommend the corn toy!

reviews.name: u****
reviews.content: 애카갔는데  거기있던 장난감을 유독 좋아해서 저도 사봤어요 ㅎ̆̈ㅎ̆̈ㅎ̆̈ 처음에 장난감치고 가격이 좀 나가지 않나 싶엇는데, 퀄리티가 너무 좋더라구요!! 그리규 강쥐가 넘 좋아해요 ㅋㅋㅋ 바잇미 장난감 유명한 아유가 있네용
reviews.content_en: We went to a pet cafe and my pup was especially into the toy there, so I got one too 😊😊😊 At first I thought the price was a bit high for a toy, but the quality is amazing!! And my strong boy loves it so much 😂😂 There's a reason BITE ME toys are famous!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
요즘 콩이 최애 장난감입니다!
바잇미에서 나오는 바나나 장난감을 제일 좋아해서 항상 어딜가나 꼭 입에 물고 다녔는데요! 요즘에는 이 군밤친구만 입에 꼭 물고 다녀요ㅋㅋㅋ 잘때도 옆에 두고 자는게 너무 귀여워요ㅜㅜ 다른 회사꺼 삑삑이를 사면 3일만에 삑삑이가 고장나던데 바잇미는 확실히 봉제랑 삑삑이 모두 튼튼하네요!! 오래쓰는 장난감 사려면 꼭 바잇미에서 사야 마음에 놓여요!!
펫 박람회에서 바잇미 다른 장남감들도 겟했었는데 온라인주문도 배송이 빠르고 좋네요! 자주 애용하겠습니다!!
reviews.content_en: Kong's current favorite toy! My pup absolutely loves the banana toy from BITE ME and always carries it everywhere in his mouth! But these days he's carrying around this roasted chestnut buddy in his mouth 😂😂 He even sleeps with it by his side, it's so cute 🥺🥺 When I buy squeaky toys from other companies, the squeak breaks in 3 days, but BITE ME's stitching and squeakers are definitely durable!! I feel confident when I buy toys from BITE ME for long-term use!! I also got other BITE ME toys at a pet expo, and even their online orders have fast shipping! I'll definitely be a regular customer!!

reviews.name: h****
reviews.content: 청경채 디자인도 귀엽고 바스락 거리는 소리가 맘에드는지 자주 갖고 놀아요 .  물고 뛰어노는 모습이 너무너무 깜찍합니다 .
reviews.content_en: The bok choy design is cute and my pup plays with it often because of the rustling sound. Watching him run around biting it is absolutely adorable.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 바스락거리는 장난감은 한 번도 안줘봤는데 , 야채장난감 평이 좋고 세일해서 사 봤거든요 . 아직은 흥미가 별로 없어요 ㅋㅋ나중에 좋아할 것 같기도 한데 ~~장난감 퀄리티는 아주 좋아요  ㅎㅎ 포장까지 너무 귀여운 거 있죠 ?? 사람들이 왜 바잇미 장난감을 좋아하는지 알겠어요😊😊
reviews.content_en: I've never given a rustling toy before, but the vegetable toy reviews were good and it was on sale so I tried it. He's not too interested yet 😂 but I think he'll like it later~~ The toy quality is really great though 😊 And the packaging is super cute, right?? Now I understand why people love BITE ME toys 😊😊

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 자기 장난감인 줄은 아는 건지 받자마자 가지고 노네요ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 너무 좋아해요 ㅠㅠ 강아지는 즐거워서 좋고 보호자는 강쥐가 귀여워서 좋고.. 금상첨화
reviews.content_en: He knows it's his toy and started playing with it right when he got it 😂😂😂😂😂 He loves it so much 🥺 The pup is happy because he's having fun, and I'm happy because my doggy is adorable.. it's a win-win!

reviews.name: 혜****
reviews.content:
너무 귀여운데요???
청경채 좋아하는 주인의 사심이 잔뜩 담긴 선택이었어요ㅋㅋ
바스락 거리는 장난감은 처음 사줬는데
이렇게 좋아할 줄 몰랐어요
하루종일 바스락바스락 잘 가지고 노네요!
장난감 자체가 너무 귀여워서 구경하는 것도 잼나요
이파리 부분에 머리 잔뜩 넣어서 바스락 거리는 모습도 너무 귀엽구요ㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠㅠ그냥 잘샀어요
다른 시리즈도 사고싶어요~!
reviews.content_en: It's so cute??? It was totally a selfish choice from an owner who loves bok choy 😂 This was my first time giving a rustling toy and I had no idea he'd love it this much! He plays with it all day long rustling away! The toy itself is so cute that it's fun just to watch! The way he buries his head in the leaf part and rustles around is absolutely precious 🥺🥺🥺🥺🥺 I just made a great purchase! I want to get the other series too~!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
청경채만한게 청경채 장난감 갖고 잘놀아용
삑삑소리는 아직 아가라 못하구
잎파리 바스락 소리를 좋아하는거같아여
맹수같은 모습을 볼수잇네요...ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: My pup about the size of bok choy plays well with this bok choy toy! He can't make the squeaking sound yet because he's still a baby, but he seems to like the rustling sound of the leaves! You can see his fierce side 😂😂

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 아니 청경채 인형 퀄리티 엄청 좋아요ㅠㅠ 사주자마자 엄마 오니까 청경채 인형 물고 문 앞으로; 잘때도 껴안고 자던데요?
reviews.content_en: Honestly, the quality of this bok choy plush is amazing ㅠㅠ As soon as I got it for my pup, she started carrying it around in her mouth and even sleeps hugging it 🥰

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 귀여운 군밤 장난감 강아지가 얼마나 좋아하게요
reviews.content_en: My dog absolutely loves this cute roasted chestnut toy 💕

reviews.name: 하****
reviews.content: 진짜 최애장난감이 되어버린 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 진짜 좋아해요 ㅠ̑̈ ㅠ̑̈
reviews.content_en: It's become my pup's absolute favorite toy lol 😭😭 She really loves it ㅠ̑̈ ㅠ̑̈

reviews.content: 울애기가 제 품으로 오자마자 사줬던 장난감이라 울애기한테 애착인형인데 어느날 장난감들 보면서 낑낑거리고 울길래 왜그러나햇더니 밤톨이(우리가부르는장난감이름)찾더라고여 ㅠㅠ ,,, 없어져가지고 계속 찾고잇던걸 나중에알아서 다시 재구매햇어요 ㅜㅜ 오자마자 주니까 밤톨이보고 어디갓엇냐는듯 바로 앙 물어가는데 내심장... ㅠㅠㅠ사랑해 울애기
reviews.content_en: I got this toy for my baby right when she came home, so it became her comfort toy, but one day she was whimpering and crying while looking at her toys, so I wondered what was wrong... and she was looking for Bamtoli (the name we call the toy) ㅠㅠ When I realized it went missing and she'd been searching for it, I ended up reordering it 😭 As soon as it arrived, she saw Bamtoli and grabbed it right away like 'where have you been?' My heart... ㅠㅠㅠ I love you, my baby

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 전에 사준 옥수수를 아직까지도 너무 잘 갖고 놀아서 이번엔 청경채로 구매해봤어요 !!! 역시나 강아지도 새 걸 아는지 환장하고 노네요 … 청경채 너무 귀엽고 .. 특히 저 망이 너무 귀여워서 뜯기 아까웠어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ ㅠ ㅠ
reviews.content_en: My pup still plays with the corn toy I got her before, so this time I decided to try the bok choy! 🎉 Just as expected, even my dog knows what's new and is obsessed with it... The bok choy is so cute and I especially loved the mesh detail so much that I felt bad tearing it ㅋㅋㅋㅋ ㅠ ㅠ

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 생각보다 큼직해서 좋았고 바스락바스락 너무좋아합니다
reviews.content_en: I really liked that it's bigger than expected, and the crinkly sound is just perfect 💕

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
보자마자 흥분하고 줬더니  흔들어 제끼고  난리가 났어요~
바로 최애템이  되어 버렸어요~
생각보다 크기도 크고  뽁뽁이 소리  바스락소리  모구 굿~
아쉬운게 있다면  울 애기가  너무 흔들어서  그런지  1시간정도만에  잎하나가 반쯤떨어져서  꿰메줬어요~
reviews.content_en: She got excited as soon as she saw it and started shaking it around like crazy! 🎉 It became her instant favorite toy! The size is bigger than I thought, and the crinkle sound and rustling sounds are all so good. The only downside is that because my pup shakes it so much, one leaf came half off after about an hour and I had to sew it back 😅

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 첫인상은 생각보다 크다는 거였어요 그런데 우리 강아지 최애 장난감이 되었어요!ㅋㅋ잎이 여러개라서 물기도 좋고 바스락소리가 나서 좋아해요.그리고 삑삑이는 위치도 잘 찾아야하고 은근 세게 눌러야 소리가 나서 사람이 내기에도 어려운데 강아지가 언젠가부터 삑삑 소리도 잘 내더라고요ㅋㅋㅋ혼자 물고 놀면서 삑삑 소리 나면 더 신나합니다ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: At first glance I thought it was bigger than expected, but it became my dog's absolute favorite toy! ㅋㅋ Since there are multiple leaves, it's great for chewing, and she loves the crinkle sound. The squeaker is in a tricky spot and requires pretty firm pressure to squeak, so it's even hard for me to make the sound, but somehow my dog figured out how to squeak it! 😂 When she plays with it and makes the squeaking sound, she gets even more excited 🐕

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 멍머가 너무 좋아해요 ㅋㅋ 삑삑 소리 바스락 소리 둘 다 나니 너무 좋네요 ㅋ
reviews.content_en: My pup loves it so much ㅋㅋ It makes both the squeaking and crinkling sounds, so it's perfect! 💕

reviews.name: 승****
reviews.content: 간식보다 장난감을 더 좋아해서 이번에 사줬는데 군밤최고예여ㅜㅜ 군밤하나 꺼내보자마자 냅다 물고 도망가네요 아침네 눈뜨니 주위에 군밤친구들 가득해서 자요ㅠ̑̈ㅠ̑̈ 군밤으로 던지기놀이랑 밤톨로 터그놀이 안에다가 간식숨기고 노즈워크놀이 쓰리콤보 가능해요!! 작고소즁해오
reviews.content_en: My dog prefers toys over treats, so I got her this and the roasted chestnut is the best!! 😭😭 As soon as I pulled out one chestnut, she grabbed it and ran off. I woke up this morning and there were roasted chestnuts all around where she sleeps ㅠ̑̈ㅠ̑̈ You can do three combos with it - fetch play with the chestnut, tug play with the nuts, and hide treats inside for nosework play! It's small and durable 💕

reviews.name: 여****
reviews.content:
꺅 귀여운 자태는 여전하네요!💚💚💚
사실 이번 청경채는 재구입한 두번째 청경채입니다 ㅎㅎ
첫번째 청경채는 저희 멍멍이의 애착인형으로 애정과 관심을 듬뿍받고 회생불가할 정도로 터지고 더러워졌네요 ㅎㅎㅎ˃̵ᴗ˂̵ 

크기도 무게도 적당히 크고 무게감 있어서 큰 저희 멍멍이의 좋은 친구였습니다🥬🤍🤍
항상 본인 자는 자리에 가져다둘 정도로 좋아해줘서 부지런히 세탁하면서 정말 1년 잘 데리고 놀았습니다! 두번째 뉴경채도 올드경채처럼 좋아해줬으면 하는 바람입니당~!!

+사진 찍으면서 청경채 얼굴을 자세히 보니 얼굴이 조금 더 예뻐졌네요! 바스락하는 부분도 더 빳빳해지고 바스락 소리가 더 커졌어요ㅋㅋ 같은 품목이라도 꾸준히 리뉴얼하는 바잇미 리스펙합니다!!
reviews.content_en:
Aww, it's still so cute! 💚💚💚
Actually, this is my second time buying this toy vegetable! 😄
The first one became my pup's comfort toy and got so much love and attention that it ended up completely torn and dirty ㅋㅋㅋ˃̵ᴗ˂̵

The size and weight are just right—nice and hefty, making it a great buddy for our big boy! 🥬🤍🤍
He loved it so much that he'd carry it to his sleeping spot, so I washed it frequently and we played with it for a whole year! I'm really hoping our second toy vegetable will be just as beloved as the original one~!!

+When I looked at the toy's face while taking photos, it actually looks a bit cuter! The crinkly parts feel crunchier and the sound is louder too ㅋㅋ I really respect BITE ME for continuously improving even the same products!!

reviews.name: 성****
reviews.content:
바잇미 농산물 장난감 옥수수 (삑삑/바스락/노즈워크) 🌽🐶✨

노즈워크 장난감 찾다가 귀여워서 구매했는데 기능이 생각보다 좋아서 만족도 높은 제품이에요 😊

✔️ 노즈워크 기능으로 집중력 UP 🧠
옥수수 껍질 부분에 간식 숨길 수 있는 구조라 강아지가 냄새 맡으면서 찾느라 집중해서 놀아요. 단순 장난감보다 머리 쓰는 놀이라 더 좋은 느낌이에요.  ￼

✔️ 삑삑 + 바스락 소리로 흥미 유도 🎶
안에 삑삑이랑 바스락 소리가 같이 있어서 혼자서도 잘 가지고 놀고 질리지 않아요. 소리에 반응하면서 계속 흥미를 유지해요.  ￼

✔️ 퍼피도 물기 좋은 사이즈 🐾
가벼워서 퍼피가 물고 다니기 좋고, 입 작은 아이들도 부담 없이 가지고 놀 수 있어요.

✔️ 스트레스 해소 & 분리불안 완화 👍
간식 숨겨주면 한참 집중해서 놀아서 심심함 해소나 분리불안 완화용으로도 괜찮아요.

✔️ 디자인까지 귀여움 🌽💛
농산물 컨셉이라 귀엽고 사진 찍어도 잘 나와서 보호자 만족도도 높은 장난감이에요.

전체적으로 노즈워크 + 장난감 기능 같이 있는 제품 찾는 분들께 추천합니다 😊
간식 숨겨주면 집중해서 오래 놀아서 활용도 높은 장난감이에요! 🐶✨
reviews.content_en:
BITE ME Farm Vegetable Toy Corn (Squeaker/Crinkle/Nose Work) 🌽🐶✨

I bought this cute nose work toy while searching for enrichment toys, and it's actually better than expected! Super satisfied with this product 😊

✔️ Nose Work Function = Better Concentration 🧠
You can hide treats in the corn husk part, so your pup gets mentally engaged while sniffing and searching for them. It's more stimulating than just a regular toy since it requires some thinking!

✔️ Squeaker + Crinkle Sounds Keep Them Interested 🎶
With both squeaker and crinkle sounds, your pup will play with it solo and won't get bored. They keep coming back to the sounds and stay engaged.

✔️ Perfect Size Even for Puppies 🐾
It's lightweight so puppies can easily carry it around, and dogs with smaller mouths can play with it comfortably.

✔️ Stress Relief & Helps with Separation Anxiety 👍
When you hide treats inside, they get focused and entertained for a while, which is great for combating boredom and easing separation anxiety.

✔️ Adorable Design Too 🌽💛
With the farm vegetable concept, it's super cute and looks great in photos, so owners love it too!

Overall, I'd recommend this to anyone looking for a toy that combines nose work and regular play features 😊
Hide treats in it and your pup will play focused for a long time—very versatile! 🐶✨

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
노즈워크 장난감은 처음이라 난이도가 낮은 제품을 선택했어야 했는데 옥수수가 껍질쪽만 벗기면 바로 나오게 되어 있어서 너무 좋았어요
이도 막 나기 시작하는 중이라 잇몸이 많이 간지러운지 여기 저기 많이 물고 그러는데 옥수수 머리 쪽에 하얀 실들 씹고 당기고 하면서 조금씩 사람 손보다는 장난감을 많이 물어요!
저희 애기는 아직 간식을 못 먹어서 사료를 넣어주는데 냄새 맡고 열심히 발도 사용해보고 애기 성장에 너무 좋은 도움을 받을 것 같아요:)
특히 바스락 소리와 삑삑이는 소리에 잘 반응하는 저희 애기한테 너무 소중한 장난감,,♡
reviews.content_en:
Since it was my first nose work toy, I should have picked something with lower difficulty, but the corn is designed so you can easily peel just the husk to get to the treats—perfect!
My pup's teething and their gums are really itchy, so they've been chewing on things everywhere. But watching them gnaw and pull on the white corn silk part is getting them to chew the toy much more than my hands!
My baby isn't eating treats yet, so I put kibble in it instead. They're sniffing it and trying to use their paws to get it out—it's such a great way to help with their development :)
Specially, the crinkle and squeaker sounds are really engaging for my pup who responds well to sounds... such a precious toy,,♡

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
청경채는 보기보다  큽니다  삑삑이소리보단   바스락소리가 위주라고보면돼요  애기가  환장을하고 물고  흔들고  아주  온방을  휘젖고다니며  으르렁 대는데 귀엽네요  산것중에   오래가지고 노네요  금방 흥미를 잀어버리는 아인데  이번에 요 청경채를 물고 돌아다니는게  이뻐죽겠어요 맨날 놀아달라 때쓰는데  혼자 잘놀아요
옥수수도 사줘야할듯  바스락소리 아주 크게나고 굿
reviews.content_en:
The toy vegetable is bigger than it looks. The crinkle sound is more prominent than the squeaker, if I'm being honest. My pup goes crazy for it—chewing, shaking, tearing around the whole house, and growling adorably. It's one of the toys that lasts the longest! My pup usually gets bored quickly, but watching them carry this toy vegetable around is absolutely precious. They're always begging to play, but they play with this one alone just fine.
I should probably get the corn too—the crinkle sound is super loud. Awesome!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
기존에 있던 다른 야채 인형이 명을 다해 새로운 야채를 데리고 왔습니다.
일단 너무 귀엽게 생겼고ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
소리나는 장난감인형을 좋아하는 애라
바스락 삑삑이 다 있어서 아주 행복하게 가지고 놉니다.
삑삑이 크기가 좀 작아서 아마 얼마못가 소리가 안나게 되겠지만 그래도 만족합니다!
나중에 소리가 안나면 다른 인형도 사봐야겠어요ㅋㅋ
reviews.content_en:
The old vegetable toy finally retired, so we brought home a new veggie friend.
It's seriously adorable ㅋㅋㅋㅋ
My pup loves toys with sounds, so having both the crinkle and squeaker made them super happy.
The squeaker size is a bit small so the sound might stop working soon, but I'm still satisfied!
If the sound stops working later, I'll probably buy another toy ㅋㅋ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
바잇미 밭 ? 형태로된 콩 옥수수 고구마 장난감에서 옥수수, 고구마 껍질을 너무 좋아해서 옥수수 큰버전 구매해봤는데 위에 흰 털?부분이랑 껍질이 커서 엄청 좋아해요!! 껍질은 바스락 거리고
몸통은 삑삑이 입니다 ! 최애 장난감이 됐어요 😖
reviews.content_en: I loved the corn and sweet potato husks from the BITE ME field-shaped bean, corn, and sweet potato toy set, so I decided to try the larger corn version. The white furry part and the husk are bigger, and my pup LOVES it!! The husk crinkles and the body has a squeaker! This is now their favorite toy 😖

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 3개월 조금 안된 애기 강아지에요 ! 노즈워크 장난감은 처음인데 간식찾기 어렵지 않게 되어있어서 좋았고 바스락 소리에 삑삑이 소리까지 들리니까 강아지가 좋아서 환장하더라구요😂 실부분도 물고 놀기 좋게 되어있고 아직 애기라 그런지 장난감이 조금 큰감이 없지 않아 있지만 저렇게 커도 잘물고 다녀요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 견생3개월차 최애 장난감이 되었습니다 ❤️‍🔥
reviews.content_en: My pup is just under 3 months old! This is our first nose work toy, and I love how the treat-finding difficulty level isn't too high. When my pup hears both the crinkle and squeaker sounds together, they go absolutely wild 😂 The string part is great for chewing too, and even though my baby is still small and the toy is a bit big, they chew and carry it around just fine ㅋㅋㅋㅋ It's become their favorite toy at 3 months of age ❤️‍🔥

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 군밤이 바스락 소리 삑삑소리, 노즈워크 등 다양하게 할수 있을 것 같아서 구매했는데 만족합니다. 군밤 두알을 다 넣으면 애들 스스로 빼기 어렵게 빡빡해서 한알만 간식과 함께 넣어둡니다. 너무 만족하고 있어요. 군밤물고 걸어올때 쓰러져요ㅎㅎㅎ 앗 추가로 세탁도 깔끔하게 하기 좋게 되어 있어요. 밤껍질(?)에 간식 넣으면 부스러기로 지저분해지는데 세탁할때 속천을 쏙 당겨 깨낼수 있어서(속천을 못꺼내는 인형들도 있어서) 깨끗하게 세탁해서 사용가능합니다 완전 감동한 부분입니다.
reviews.content_en: I bought the Roasted Chestnut because it seemed like it could do a lot—crinkle sounds, squeaker, nose work, etc.—and I'm really happy with it. When I fill both chestnuts it gets too tight for them to remove on their own, so I usually just put one in with a treat. I'm so satisfied! When they carry the chestnut toy around, they sometimes trip ㅎㅎㅎ Oh, plus the washing is really convenient too! When you put treats in the chestnut shell part, it gets messy with crumbs, but you can pull out the inner mesh during washing to clean it properly (some toys don't even have removable liners), so you can keep it clean and reuse it. I was totally impressed by this feature!

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content:
오자마자 봉지 뜯지도 않고 신상러버🥰
한달이 지난 지금도 최애 장난감 여러 장난감이 있지만 위에 달려있는 수술은 터그놀이로 삑삑이랑 바스락소리는 아이에 귀를 즐겁게하고 노즈워크 달인인 저희 아이에겐 2초컷이지만.... 노즈워크도 할수 있어 다양하게 놀수있는 장난감이에요ㅎㅎㅎ 
단점은 페브릭이라 오래 가지고 놀면 침냄새와 세균번식도 좀 걱정되서 자주 세탁해줘야해요.
reviews.content_en:
Brand new favorite before even opening the package 🥰
A month later and it's still their go-to toy! There are several other toys, but the handles sewn on top are great for tug-of-war, and the squeaker and crinkle sounds make my pup's ears happy. My pup is a nose work expert so they finish it in 2 seconds, but... it's a versatile toy since you can also do nose work with it ㅎㅎㅎ
The downside is that it's fabric, so if they play with it a lot I worry about saliva smell and bacteria buildup, so I have to wash it frequently.

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너무귀여워요ㅠㅠ ㅎ사이즈도 적당해서
좋아요  ㅎ노즈워크도하고
인형도가지고놀고 짱짱
reviews.content_en: It's so cute ㅠㅠ ㅎ and the size is just right too ㅎ my pup does nose work and plays with the plush and it's perfect!

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
우리 아기 강아지 여름이 청경채 인형 최애입니다.
이거 없으면 안돼요. 자기 혼자 레슬링하는데, 청경채 인형은 레슬링 파트너입니다. 인형치고 비싼건가 했는데
아주 뽕을 뽑습니다. 혹시라도 망가지면 또 사줄 예정입니다. 
잎사귀부분에바스락 소리가 나서 정말 강추템이에요.
reviews.content_en: Our baby puppy Yeoreum's absolute favorite is the bok choy plush toy. We can't live without it. She wrestles by herself, and the bok choy toy is her wrestling partner. I thought it was expensive for a plush toy, but it's totally worth the money. If it ever gets damaged, I'm planning to buy another one. The leaves make a crinkly sound which makes it a must-have item. Highly recommended! 🌟

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content: 청경채장난감 개복치 할인할때 눈 여겨보던 청경채도 같이 구매했어요~두개 다 진챠 넘모 귀여워요ఇ 청경채는 처음 나왔을때부터 사줘야지 생각했던건데 이번에 구매하게되었네용ㅎㅎ 뜯기 아까울 정도의 퀄리티 쩌는 포장망에 심쿵했네용〰️ 아직 7개월/1.6kg 개린이라 청경채 크기가 울 댕댕이 몸집만하긴한데 튼튼하고 좋아용!! 소리 나는 장난감을 좋아해서 바스락 소리에 환장해요ㅋㅋ 안그래도 귀여운 울 애긔 더 귀엽게 만들어버리는 바잇미 장난감..더 럽ෆ⃛ 댕댕이들이 좋아할 수 밖에 없는 장난감들이라 다 너무 탐나요..이러다 제 지갑 텅장되겠어요!! 댕댕이들도 좋아하지만 장난감 자체가 넘모 귀여워서 제가 더 마음에 드네요...??..ㅎㅎㅎ❤️ 농산물 장난감 또 구매하러 오겠슴당〰️????
reviews.content_en: I was eyeing the bok choy when the bok choy toy moonfish was on sale, so I bought them together~ Both are seriously so cute ఇ I've been thinking I should buy the bok choy since it first came out, and I finally got it this time hehe The quality is so good I almost didn't want to unbox it, and the packaging made my heart flutter〰️ Our pup is still only 7 months/1.6kg and a beginner pup, so the bok choy is about the size of our doggy's body, but it's sturdy and so good!! She loves toys that make sounds so she goes crazy over the crinkly noise ㅋㅋ BITE ME toys that make our already cute baby even cuter.. love it more ෆ⃛ These toys are ones the puppers can't help but love, so I want them all.. I'm worried my wallet is going to be empty!! Our doggy loves them but I actually love the toys themselves more since they're so cute...??..ㅎㅎㅎ❤️ I'll be back to buy more vegetable toys〰️????

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content: 작년 말에 군밤을 보자마자 사야겠다 마음 먹고 바잇미 사이트 왔었는데...품절이라 눈물을 삼키고 입고됐다는 소식을 듣고 호두 새해 선물로 사줬어요.  일단 패키징에서 깨알 포인트! 정말 군밤 봉투에 담겨온듯한 느낌! 따갑지 않은 까시가 있다는 말대로 ㅋㅋ꺼내자마자 부들부들한 방송이 안에 귀여운 밤톨군 2마리를 발견했어요.  역시 바잇미라는 말이 나올정도로 퀄리티 마감 귀여움 모두 만족입니다.  근데 아쉬운 점은 ㅜㅜ 노즈워크용 과자를 넣고 밤톨군 2마리 넣으면 사람 손으로도 밤톨군을 꺼내기 힘들 정도로 입구가 매우 뻑뻑합니다... 전 고무줄의 신축성이 어느정도는 있겠지 생각했는데...아예 신축성이 없는 수준...호두가 주둥이로 밤톨군 꺼내려다가 안대서 밤톨 까시만 화나서 물뜯 ㅠㅠ 그것때문에 별 하나뺐어요.  다음에는 입구부분의 신축성을 조금 늘릴수 있는 고무줄을 내장하면 좋을 것 같습니다~ 그래도 귀여우니 만족해요. 주변사람들에게 추천중~~!!
reviews.content_en: At the end of last year, as soon as I saw the roasted chestnuts, I decided I had to buy them and went to the BITE ME site... but they were sold out so I held back my tears. Then I heard they were coming back in stock, so I bought them as a New Year's gift for Hodoo. First of all, the packaging has such a cute detail! It really feels like it came in an actual roasted chestnut bag! Just like they said, the shells aren't sharp ㅋㅋ When I opened it, I found two cute little chestnut guys in soft, fluffy packaging. BITE ME really lives up to its reputation—the quality, finishing, and cuteness are all satisfying. But here's the disappointing part ㅜㅜ When I put treat-dispensing snacks inside and add the two little chestnut guys, the opening gets so tight that it's hard to pull them out even with human hands... I thought the elastic band would have some stretch, but it has basically none at all... Hodoo tried to pull out the little chestnut guys with her snout but couldn't, so she got frustrated and gnawed at just the shell ㅠㅠ That's why I deducted one star. Next time, it would be great if you could use an elastic band with a bit more stretch for the opening~ Still, it's cute so I'm satisfied. I'm recommending it to people around me~~!!

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
농산물 장난감 다 모았어요! 우리 강아지가 너무 좋아하는 장난감이라 이번에 적양파까지 샀는데 짱 좋아하네요.ㅋㅋ
바스락 삑삑이 다 돼서 좋아요. 옥수수랑 청경채는 사이즈가 큰편인데도 잘 물고 다녀요
reviews.content_en: I've collected all the vegetable toys! Our dog loves these toys so much, so this time I even bought the red onion and she loves it ㅋㅋ It's great that they make crinkly sounds and squeaks. The corn and bok choy are pretty big in size but she still carries them around well

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 청경채 내 거야 으컁컁 ! 청경채 바스락 소리도 좋아하고 삑삑 소리나게 눌러주면 더 좋아해요 지금 이갈이를 많이 하는데 잘 가지고 놀아요ㅎㅎㅎ 다른 채소도 사줘야겠어요 잘 쓸게요 감사합니다:)
reviews.content_en: This bok choy is mine! nom nom! 😋 I love the crinkly sound of the bok choy and she loves it even more when I squeeze it and it squeaks. She's teething a lot right now and plays with it well ㅎㅎㅎ I should buy her the other vegetables too. Thanks for the great product :)

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 바스락  장난감이 너덜너덜해져서  후기  좋은  청경채로 샀는데  바스락  소리도 잘 나고  삑삑 소리도 나서  아이가 졸아해요.  너무  커서  가족들은  모두  배추인 줄 알았대요. 청경채라니까  모두 깜놀.  저희 아이는 소형견이라  조금 더 작았으면 하는 바람이  있네요.
reviews.content_en: My old crinkly toy was getting all tattered, so I bought the bok choy which had great reviews, and it makes both crinkly and squeaky sounds so my pup loves it. It's so big that all my family members thought it was cabbage ㅋㅋㅋ When I told them it was bok choy, they were all surprised! Since our pup is a small breed, I wish it was a bit smaller.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content: 강아지가 정말 좋아해요! 야채시리즈는 크기도 큰데 삑삑이와 바스락이 숨어있어 더 좋아하는 듯해요
reviews.content_en: My dog really loves it! The vegetable series is pretty big in size, but it seems like the pup loves it even more because there are squeaks and crinkles hidden inside!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
후기를 열심히 읽어보고 청경채가 뭔가 인기가 많은거 같아 했는데요ㅎㅎ 
청경채 생각보다 크네요!!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ
바스락 거리는 소리도 크고 노즈워크 하기에도 좋을 거 같아요!!!ㅎㅎ
아이가 바스락 거리는 소리를 좋아하는데 
청경채 잎파리부분에 크게 들어가있어서 좋아요!!
reviews.content_en: I read the reviews carefully and noticed that the bok choy seemed to be really popular hehe The bok choy is bigger than I expected!!ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ The crinkly sound is loud too and it seems like it would be great for nose work too!!!ㅎㅎ My pup loves crinkly sounds and the bok choy has the crinkles concentrated in the leaves part so she loves it!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 평소에도 바잇미 장난감이면 환장하는 오댕이들입니다. 큰 맘 먹고 이것저것 구매했는데 역시 아이들이 너무 좋아하네요. 가격은 비싼 편이지만 아이들이 좋아해서 마음에 쏙 들어요.
reviews.content_en: Our old pup goes crazy for BITE ME toys. I decided to splurge and buy a bunch of different ones, and as expected, the pups absolutely love them. The price is on the expensive side, but since the pups love them so much, I'm really happy with the purchase.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 군밤 두알이 너무 귀엽게 들어있어용! 저희 멍멍이도 반가워 하네용 ㅎㅎ 군밤속에 간식 숨겨놓고 던져주면 엄청 좋아라해용😊
reviews.content_en: The two roasted chestnuts are so adorably tucked inside! Our puppy is so happy about it too hehe If I hide treats inside the roasted chestnut and throw it, she absolutely loves it 😊

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content:
청경채 진짜 귀여워 죽어요
크기도 생각보다 큰데 가벼워서 소형견들도 쉽게 가지고 놀 수 있습니다
농작물 시리즈는 전부 귀여워요
reviews.content_en: The bok choy is seriously so cute 😆 It's bigger than I expected but super light, so even small dogs can easily play with it. The whole crop series is adorable!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
포장 뜯자마자 난리났습니다 ㅋㅋ
삑삑이 소리 듣고 몇바퀴를 돌더니 하루종일 군밤만 갖고 노네요ㅎ 자다가도 제가 군밤 가지고 가면 벌떡 일어나서 따라와요 ! 

단점은 처음에 실뭉텅이가 많이 나와요
그래서 테이프로 어느정도 제거하긴 했는데 놀때 입으로 들어가진 않을까 걱정이긴 합니다(그냥은 안빠지고 테이프로 하면 빠지는 정도?)

그리고 밤 두개 넣으면 못 뺄 것 같아서 우선 한개만 넣어줬어요 ㅎ 나름 잘 빼더라구요! 결론은 만족합니당! 곧 또 사러올 듯해요.. 하루 만에 저리된걸 보니..ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en:
It was chaos the moment we opened the package lol 😂 As soon as he heard the squeaky sound, he spun around a few times and now he's been playing with the roasted chestnut all day! He even jumps up from naps when I pick up the chestnut and follows me around! 

The downside is there's a lot of loose threads at first. I removed some with tape, but I'm a bit worried they might go in his mouth while playing (they don't fall out on their own, but they do with tape). 

Also, I figured if I put two chestnuts in he wouldn't be able to get them out, so I only put one in for now 😄 He's actually pretty good at taking them out! Overall, I'm very satisfied! I think I'll be ordering again soon... the way he destroyed it in just one day lol 😂

reviews.name: 조****
reviews.content: 군밤을 너무좋아해요,, 옥수수 뿌리는 곧 거덜나게 생겼고여 군밤은 귀엽기도하고 노즈워크 하기에 딱인것 같아요ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: He absolutely loves the roasted chestnut 🥜 The corn looks like it'll fall apart soon, but the chestnut is not only cute but also perfect for nose work! 😄

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
콩이가 너무 좋아해서 대만족입니다
박음질도 튼튼하고 소리도 나고 입사귀가 나눠져서 터그놀이 하기에도 좋네요
reviews.content_en: Kong really loves it, so I'm super happy! The stitching is sturdy, it makes sounds, and the ear part is split so it's great for tug-of-war too!

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
택배오고 나서 빨아서 주려고 탁자 위에 올려놨었는데 스스로 꺼내갈 정도로 처음부터 마음에 들었나봐요ㅎㅎ
며칠 밖에 안됐는데 구멍이 날 정도로 격하게 가지고 놀았어요!
잠 잘 때도 옆에 두고 자고 아침에 일어나서, 저녁에 자기 전에도 계속 주위에 맴돌고 있네요)(
간식 넣어주기엔 입구가 좁아서 아직 어려워해서 노즈워크로 활용하진 못하지만 그냥 너무 좋아해서 구매한 보람이 있어요 !!
reviews.content_en: The delivery came and I was about to wash it before giving it to him, so I put it on the table... and he took it for himself right away lol 😄 It's only been a few days but he's been playing with it so hard there's already a hole in it! He sleeps with it next to him, keeps circling around it when he wakes up in the morning and before bed at night. The entrance is too narrow for treat dispensing so he hasn't figured out the nose work yet, but he just loves it so much that it was totally worth buying!!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 강아지가 마음에 들어하는 눈치입니다. 귀여워요. 배송도 빠르구요.
reviews.content_en: My dog seems to really like it. It's super cute. Shipping was fast too.

reviews.name: 수****
reviews.content:
장난감중에 최애에요 하루종일 바시락 거리면서 놀고 
밤에 불끄면 울었는데 청경채인형 주니까 잎파리에 폭 안겨서 잘자구 깨면 또 혼자 소리내면서 놀구 ㅜㅜ 그냥 24시간 갖구 놀아요 !! 옆구리 터져서 바느질 해줬는데 , 애기가 너무 좋아해서 비상용으로 하나 더 주문했어요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ 
인스타( a_appple_) 피드/스토리 반이 청경채에요
 😆😆😆
reviews.content_en: It's my favorite toy! He plays with it rustling all day long. He used to cry when I turned off the lights at night, but now when I give him the bok choy plushie he snuggles right into the leaves and sleeps! When he wakes up, he plays with it making sounds by himself 🥺 He plays with it 24/7!! The side ripped so I stitched it up, but he loved it so much that I ordered a backup one lolol 😂 Half of my Instagram feed (a_appple_) is bok choy 😆😆😆

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
큼직만해서 좋아요.
청경채 모양도 잘 살렸고 색감도 이쁘고.. ㅎㅎ
잘 가지고 놀아요.
reviews.content_en: I like that it's a nice big size. The bok choy shape is well-made, the colors are pretty, and he plays with it a lot! 😊

reviews.name: 장****
reviews.content:
채소답게 포장이 빨간 양파망으로 되어있어 신박하면서 웃겼어요! 사실 크기는 생각보다 1.5배-2배 가까이 더 컸는데 차라리 커서 더 나은것 같아요. 작으면 어디 구석에 처박히기도 쉽고 잎파리가 너무 작아 강아지가 물기 힘들었을것 같아요!

크기가 큰 만큼 무게도 있지만 처음에는 좀 힘들어보이더니 지금은 요령을 터득해서 잘 쫓아갔다가 잘 물고 와요.
reviews.content_en: The packaging being a red onion mesh like actual vegetables was so creative and funny! The size was actually 1.5-2 times bigger than I expected, but honestly the bigger size is better. If it were smaller, it'd probably just get shoved into corners, and the leaves would be so small the dog might have trouble biting it. It's heavier because of the size, but at first he seemed to struggle a bit and now he's figured it out—he chases it down and brings it back nicely!

reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
사실 지인 선물로 청경채를 ㅋㄹ통해서 첫 구매했고, 바잇미 쇼핑몰이 있는걸 이번에 알게되서 옥수수 구매했습니닼ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ ㅋㄹ에는 옥수수가 없어욬ㅋㅋㅋ 옥수수도 아주 대만족! 이번엔 우리집 새식구가 된 애기 선물로 구매해봤습니다.

바스락, 삑삑, 털실의 머리카락까지 애기가 엄청 좋아해욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 근데 옥수수 아저씨가 한대 얻어 맞았는지 코가 삐뚫어져있네욬ㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋㅋ

애기가 잘 갖고 놀아서 아주아주 만족합니당!
reviews.content_en:
Actually my first purchase was the bok choy as a gift for a friend lol 😂 I just found out BITE ME has their own shopping mall this time and bought the corn hehe 😆 They don't have corn at the other place! Super satisfied with the corn too! This time I bought it as a gift for our new family member.

The baby absolutely loves the crinkle sound, squeaks, and even the yarn strings!! 😂 But looks like the corn mister got punched in the face because his nose is all crooked lololol 😆😆😆 

My baby loves playing with it so I'm very very satisfied!
